name: Test User
nextActions: Map three people who influence your next move and choose one useful touchpoint.
Send one concise impact update that connects your work to a business priority.
Prepare a stakeholder-specific version of your recommendation before the next meeting.

blueprint.outcome: Create measurable progress toward: Get promoted to manager.
blueprint.day30: Complete evidence inventory and manager expectation check.
blueprint.day60: Increase visibility with stakeholders and package strategic impact.
blueprint.day90: Prepare a credible promotion conversation and follow-up plan.
blueprint.successMetric: Complete at least one career action per week and improve the lowest score component.

escalation: Human review optional after the first two weekly check-ins or if blockers repeat.
